import React from 'react'; import Navbar from '../components/Navbar'; import FeatureCard from '../components/FeatureCard'; import '../styles/landing.css'; const features = [ { title: 'Multitrack Recorder', desc: 'Record and edit multiple tracks with precision timing.' }, { title: 'Advanced Mixer', desc: 'Powerful mixing console with channel strips, busses and FX.' }, { title: 'Virtual Instruments', desc: 'Built-in synths and samplers to create unique sounds.' }, { title: 'MIDI & Automation', desc: 'Full MIDI routing and automation lanes for expressive control.' }, { title: 'Plugin Support', desc: 'VST/AU plugin support for third-party effects and instruments.' }, { title: 'Collaborative Projects', desc: 'Share projects and collaborate in real-time with teammates.' } ]; function Home() { return (

Reson Studio

A modern Digital Audio Workstation — compose, record, mix, and master.

Trusted by producers and studios worldwide

Powerful features for music creators

{features.map((f) => ( ))}

Ready to create your next track?

© {new Date().getFullYear()} Reson Studio — Made with love for music
Docs Community Support
); } export default Home;
